title: Zluri Snapshot Data Upload
description: Payload for uploading snapshot entity data within an active sync session. Snapshot data represents the current state of entities.

entity.description: The type of snapshot entity being uploaded. Dependencies: users must be synced before groups, group_users, and activities.

page.description: Page number for this batch of data. Re-uploading the same page number overwrites previous data for that page.

data.description: Array of entity records. Maximum 1000 records per page.
